keywords: score clamp reputation scale 1.0 5.0 weighted average float escape named check star rating FLOW-06 confusion
ironRules: Score range [1.0, 5.0] — star-rating scale, NOT a quality score [0,1] (do not confuse with FLOW-06)
Math.max(1.0, Math.min(5.0, rawScore)) applied before storeDocument
Weighted average with recency weights can produce values below 1.0 or above 5.0 with sparse data
rawScore written directly = BUILD_FAILURE — downstream consumers receive out-of-range scores
